zh.Everingham, Yorkshire, England, United K: 英國英格蘭越可爾艾華靈漢
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellen Ingleby於1432年出生在英國越可爾利普利時，她的父親William Ingleby Lord of the Manor of Ripley19歲，母親Joan Stapleton17歲。她於大約1460年與Robert Eure結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1482年7月21日在英國英格蘭越可爾艾華靈漢享年50歲。

zh-hans.Everingham, Yorkshire, England, United K: 英国英格兰越可爾艾華靈漢
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ellen Ingleby于1432年出生在英国越可爾利普利时，她的父亲William Ingleby Lord of the Manor of Ripley19岁，母亲Joan Stapleton17岁。她于大约1460年与Robert Eure结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她去世于1482年7月21日在英国英格兰越可爾艾華靈漢享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ingleby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called Ingleby (in Lincolnshire, Yorkshire, and Derbyshire). The placenames mean ‘farmstead of the English’, from Old English Engle ‘English’ (genitive plural Engla) + Old Norse bȳ ‘farmstead’.

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Ellen Ingleby was born in 1432, in Ripley, Yorkshire, England, her father, William Ingleby Lord of the Manor of Ripley, was 19 and her mother, Joan Stapleton, was 17. She married Robert Eure about 1460. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died on 21 July 1482, in Everingham, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ellen Ingleby est née en 1432, à Ripley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William Ingleby Lord of the Manor of Ripley, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Joan Stapleton, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Eure environ 1460. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 juillet 1482, à Everingham, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ellen Ingleby 1432 in Ripley, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Ingleby Lord of the Manor of Ripley 19 und ihre Mutter Joan Stapleton 17. Sie hat um 1460 Robert Eure geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. Juli 1482 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Everingham, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ellen Ingleby è nata il nel 1432 nel Ripley, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, William Ingleby Lord of the Manor of Ripley, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Joan Stapleton, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Robert Eure circa 1460. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 21 luglio 1482, nel Everingham, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ellen Inglebyが1432年にイギリスヨークシュアイアリプリーで生まれた時，父William Ingleby Lord of the Manor of Ripleyは19歳，母Joan Stapletonは17歳であった。約1460年にRobert Eureと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1482年7月21日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアエバーインガムで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ellen Ingleby(이)가 1432년 영국 요르크실르 리플리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Ingleby Lord of the Manor of Ripley(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Stapleton(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 대략 1460년 Robert Eure(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1482년 7월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 에버링함에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Everingham, Yorkshire, England, United K: Everingham, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ellen Ingleby nasceu em 1432, em Ripley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Ingleby Lord of the Manor of Ripley, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Joan Stapleton, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Eure aproximadamente 1460. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de julho de 1482, em Everingham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ellen Ingleby родилась в 1432 г. в местности рипли, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Ingleby Lord of the Manor of Ripley было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Stapleton, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Eure около 1460 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла 21 июля 1482 г. в местности эвирингхам, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ellen Ingleby nació en 1432, en Ripley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Ingleby Lord of the Manor of Ripley, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Joan Stapleton, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Robert Eure aproximadamente 1460. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 21 de julio de 1482, en Everingham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años.
